CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, original String);
SELECT id, original, reverseUTF8(original) AS reversed FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, original, reverseUTF8(original) AS reversed FROM test_strings WHERE original IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, reverseUTF8(original) AS reversed FROM (SELECT id, original FROM test_strings WHERE id <= 3) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE reversed_strings AS SELECT id, reverseUTF8(original) AS reversed FROM test_strings;
SELECT t1.id, t1.original, t2.reversed FROM test_strings t1 JOIN (SELECT id, reverseUTF8(original) AS reversed FROM test_strings) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT id, reverseUTF8(concat(original, ' additional text')) AS reversed FROM test_strings;
WITH (SELECT count(*) FROM test_strings) AS count_rows SELECT id, original, reverseUTF8(original) AS reversed, count_rows FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, original, reverseUTF8(REPLACE(original, 'o', '0')) AS reversed_replaced FROM test_strings;
